query: SELECT 'dailySales' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM dailySales WHERE saleDate >= '2026-03-14' UNION ALL SELECT 'productSales', COUNT(*) FROM productSales WHERE periodStart >= '2026-03-14';
